title: City Stations
description: Stations in cities for caravans to drop off supplies. Sending a caravan to a city without a station takes longer because they cannot drop off supplies and leave. Stations enable efficient multi-city routes.
definition-of-done: Station construction in cities. Stations reduce turnaround time. Cities without stations have time penalty. Station costs and benefits visible.
testing-plan: Verify station construction works. Test turnaround time reduction. Verify no-station penalty. Test cost/benefit display.
todos: Build time penalty for no-station cities
